zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Zouche於1572年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特布洛沃斯時，她的父親Charles de La Zouche23歲，母親Ursela Bray27歲。她於1592年1月12日與John Pitfield在英國英格蘭戴文可利頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Zouche于1572年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特布洛沃斯时，她的父亲Charles de La Zouche23岁，母亲Ursela Bray27岁。她于1592年1月12日与John Pitfield在英国英格兰戴文可利頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Chantal, Dominique, Francois, Herve, Michel, Rodolphe, Serge.
French (Fouché): variant of Foucher . Compare Fooshee , Foshee , Fouch , and Foushee .
Altered form (Fouché) of French Foucher (compare 1 above), found mainly in South Africa.

variants.name: Foucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Etienne, Henri, Lydie, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Folchari, composed of the elements folk, folc ‘people’ and hari ‘army’. Compare Faucher 2.

variants.name: Foushee
meanings: History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its original form Fouché) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Fouch
meanings: Altered form of   Fouts  , a surname of German origin.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Fudge  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Zouche was born in 1572, in Bloxworth, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Charles de La Zouche, was 23 and her mother, Ursela Bray, was 27. She married John Pitfield on 12 January 1592, in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Zouche est née en 1572, à Bloxworth, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Charles de La Zouche, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ursela Bray, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Pitfield le 12 janvier 1592, à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Zouche 1572 in Bloxworth, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles de La Zouche 23 und ihre Mutter Ursela Bray 27. Sie hat am 12. Januar 1592 in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom John Pitfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Zouche è nata il nel 1572 nel Bloxworth, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Charles de La Zouche, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Ursela Bray, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Pitfield il 12 gennaio 1592, nel Colyton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Zoucheが1572年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブロクスウオルスで生まれた時，父Charles de La Zoucheは23歳，母Ursela Brayは27歳であった。1592年1月12日にイギリスイギリスデボンコリトンでJohn Pitfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Zouche(이)가 1572년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 블로스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles de La Zouche(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ursela Bray(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1592년 1월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴에서 John Pitfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Zouche nasceu em 1572, em Bloxworth, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Charles de La Zouche, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ursela Bray, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Pitfield em 12 de janeiro de 1592, em Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Zouche родилась в 1572 г. в местности блоксворт, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Charles de La Zouche было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ursela Bray, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Pitfield 12 января 1592 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Zouche nació en 1572, en Bloxworth, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Charles de La Zouche, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Ursela Bray, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Pitfield el 12 de enero de 1592, en Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
